title: J6's Mob Variants
description: Expands the selection of mob variants added in the Spring to Life drop.
body:
![Mob Variants Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f99c783131a5584a06f40016c277fc426fffd2.png)
## More Animals!

The Spring to Life drop added a lot of really cool mob variants! But do you ever feel like its not enough? No worries! With this datapack you can add a plethora of new animal variants into the game!

![Several Animal from the Rusty and Forest Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11ba72a5ff85ab576f4b9f7712101b6b795fd852.jpeg)

Certain biomes will now have unique animal variants or new variants adding onto the existing ones!

## Whats New?

**Forest Biomes:**

Spawns Forest and Rusty variants

**Dark Forest Biome:**

Spawns Midnight and Ashen variants

**Flower Forest, Meadow, Sunflower Plains, & Cherry Grove:**

Spawns Floral variants

**Swamp & Mangrove Swamp:**

Spawns Marsh and Muddy Marsh Pigs

**Jungles:**

Spawns Jungle Chickens that can spawn alongside Warm Chickens

**Frozen Ocean & Deep Frozen Ocean:**

Spawns Frozen Nautilius
